title: DNA Data Storage: Archival in Biological Molecules
author: Sequoia Rivera
Biocomputing Researcher
description: Encode data in DNA sequences—but error rates and cost remain prohibitive
content:
DNA provides ultra-dense, long-term data storage in biological molecules.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Mutation Cascade (2043)](/docs/articles/mutation-cascade-2043)
